demographics.occupation: works for a company that deploys staff overseas (occupational deployment)

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My company just bumped my flight to Africa to tomorrow morning. I have no malaria pills and I am terrified of getting sick out there.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Leaving at 0800 tomorrow for a work deployment to a rural part of sub-Saharan Africa and has no malaria tablets, no travel vaccines and no travel medical kit — wants to get sorted before the flight.

symptom_narrative.onset: found out today that the flight was brought forward to 0800 tomorrow
symptom_narrative.duration: trip is imminent — departing in under 24 hours
symptom_narrative.character: no illness at all — just very anxious about being unprepared for a high-risk destination
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: feels completely well physically but is very worried about catching something serious over there
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing physical; being organised for the trip would settle the worry
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: the short notice and knowing the area has a lot of mosquitoes and disease
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: denies any fever, chills, cough, diarrhoea or feeling unwell
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: has never travelled to a malaria region before and has had no travel vaccines
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: fully independent and asymptomatic; actively packing bags

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: no ongoing health problems — says he is fit and healthy

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: travelling for an occupational deployment to a rural, high-mosquito area of sub-Saharan Africa; no previous psychiatric history; no seizures; no known heart problems

objective_data_offered.value: I feel completely fine, no fever, no chills, nothing wrong with me

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's own estimate, not measured on a calibrated scale in this encounter

objective_data_offered.value: well-looking, up and about, packing bags on camera
